meaning: n.(宗教、艺术或生活方式上的)原始主义,尚古主义,原始的风格
examples: The pursuit of primitivism can be seen throughout D.
The famous series of cut-outs by Henri Matisse are a good example of primitivism.
In the paper the author applies the critic method of primitivism to appreciate Shen Congwen's novels.
This dual focus, which probes the contradictions of "primitivism, " remains a driving force of contemporary art.
Americans' relation to the fraught subject of "primitivism" was significantly different from Europeans'.
